summary: Captured screenshots of program-reveal page: SCREENSHOT 18 (build phase animation) and SCREENSHOT 19 (Weekly Training Split + Your Program Explained sections). User is user_a with General Strength goal.
action_items: Note: 'Your Program Explained' subtitle says 'Why Conjugate works for advanced athletes' - this may be hardcoded Conjugate text (not matching the 'General Strength' program name). Main agent should verify if this subtitle is goal-specific or hardcoded.
critical_code_review_comments: The 'Your Program Explained' section shows subtitle 'Why Conjugate works for advanced athletes' for a user with General Strength goal. This could be hardcoded Conjugate text — main agent should verify goal-specific subtitle logic.

context_for_next_testing_agent: program-reveal page works correctly. Uses React Native ScrollView scrollable via scrollTop on the CSS container. Build animation completes ~15 seconds. Goal-specific split days shown for Strength goal user.
